clauses.title: Role
clauses.body: Employee hired as Senior Engineer. Duties include any tasks reasonably assigned by management.

clauses.title: Compensation
clauses.body: Base salary $120,000/year payable bi-weekly. Bonus at sole discretion of employer.

clauses.title: Intellectual Property
clauses.body: Any invention, software, or creative work produced by Employee, whether during or outside working hours, whether or not related to company business, shall be the exclusive property of Employer.

clauses.title: Non-Compete
clauses.body: Employee agrees not to work for any company in the technology sector for 3 years following termination, globally.

clauses.title: Termination
clauses.body: Employer may terminate employment at any time for any reason. Employee must provide 90 days notice to resign.

clauses.title: Arbitration
clauses.body: All disputes must be resolved through binding arbitration. Employee waives right to jury trial and class action participation.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.body: This agreement is governed by the laws of Delaware, USA.

critical_flags.description: IP clause covers personal projects outside working hours unrelated to company business
Employee waives jury trial and class action rights - significant rights removal

high_flags.description: 3 year global non-compete across entire tech sector is overly broad
Employer has at-will termination but employee requires 90 days notice to resign
